roster_delta.desc: Chicago White Sox recalled LHP Tyler Schweitzer from Charlotte Knights.

Baltimore Orioles designated RHP Kyle Nicolas for assignment.

Toronto Blue Jays placed RF Jesús Sánchez on the 10-day injured list. Right ankle sprain.

Seattle Mariners recalled LHP Josh Simpson from Tacoma Rainiers.
